objective: Identify repeated cost-exceeding intraday alpha from order-book depletion, replenishment, and opposite-side withdrawal rather than raw imbalance.

source.trust: third-party websocket capture; discovery only until reconciled with official exchange data or independent venue replay

known_exposure.schema_sample: first 1000 rows of 2026-04-07 for all four symbols inspected

information_clock.sampling: last complete snapshot in each 500 ms bucket
information_clock.missing_or_stale: fail closed; no interpolation across gaps longer than 2000 ms

independent_hypotheses.continuation: depleted side fails to replenish while opposite side withdraws; trade in depletion direction
independent_hypotheses.absorption_reversal: depleted side rapidly replenishes and price fails to progress; trade opposite depletion direction
independent_hypotheses.spoof_veto: large near-book addition disappears rapidly without price progress; veto the apparent pressure direction
independent_hypotheses.cross_asset_catchup: multiple leaders show same depletion state while one asset has not repriced; trade lagging asset only

taker.entry: first observed BBO at or after decision plus 500 ms; long at ask, short at bid
taker.exit: actual opposing BBO at fixed horizon

passive_entry_taker_exit.entry_order: post-only at current best bid for long or best ask for short
passive_entry_taker_exit.fill: opposing best price trades through order by at least one inferred tick; touches and same-side size reductions do not fill
passive_entry_taker_exit.exit: taker at actual BBO after fixed horizon from fill

execution.capacity: research order notional no more than 0.05% of visible top-five quote depth

candidate_selection.selection_open_condition: at least one adjacent rule family passes both development_fit and development_test without parameter changes
candidate_selection.validation_open_condition: one primary and one adjacent backup are frozen after selection and pass all cost, date, concentration, and execution gates

prohibitions: No use of validation dates during development
No cancellation volume credited as queue consumption
No risk or leverage optimization before unlevered net alpha passes
